# Requirement: QR-001

- Title: CI quality gate baseline
- Status: Active

## Requirement Statement

The system shall enforce CI quality gates (build, typecheck, lint, format) as merge-blocking checks on all pull requests targeting main, with visible and actionable failure messages.

## Rationale

Without enforced gates, regression risk increases and release confidence declines. Maintainers need deterministic quality assurance before merges.

## Acceptance Conditions

- CI runs build, typecheck, lint, and format checks on PRs.
- Required checks are configured as merge-blocking in repository settings.
- Failure messages are visible and actionable in CI output.

## Success Metrics

- 100% of merged PRs pass required checks.
- No direct bypass outside admin emergency workflow.

## Non-Goals

- Full performance regression suite, cross-browser matrix beyond agreed baseline.

## Constraints

- Tooling must remain compatible with Node.js 22 LTS baseline.
